issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases for devcontainer setup.
The skill assumes VS Code or GitHub Codespaces, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: basic-typescript-node-config
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items (image, ports, postCreateCommand, extensions, settings) but misses the required features block, while Response A fails to meet several key requirements such as using the specified image, including features, and correctly nesting extensions and settings.

scenarios.name: add-postgres-database
scenarios.rationale: Response B better meets the rubric, correctly defining the db service and devcontainer.json features, while Response A fails to match required service name, environment variables, and image specification.
